reference: WHEN THE MINISTER HEARD THESE WORDS HE REJOICED WITH GREAT JOY AND SAID O CHAMBERLAIN TELL ME THE TALE OF THE TWAIN AND WHAT BEFEL THEM AND THE CAUSE OF THEIR LONG ABSENCE
text: When the minister heard these words, he rejoiced with great joy, and said, "O chamberlain, tell me the tale of the twain and what befell them, and the cause of their long absence."
